headline_verified_findings: src/middleware.ts (the active middleware) unconditionally returns NextResponse.next() for every request - VERIFIED zero auth enforcement in middleware.
No layout.tsx file anywhere in src/app performs an auth check (root layout, (crm) layout, dashboard layout all read and confirmed clean); admin and analytics have no layout.tsx at all.
Of 31 live API routes, only 4 (admin/users, notifications, leads/import, cron/followups) perform any authentication check.
admin/users role check (user.role !== 'admin') compares the Supabase Auth GoTrue role, not the application's user_profiles.role - the two are never joined together in getCurrentUser().
WhatsApp webhook POST handler has no signature/HMAC verification.
notification_settings table has a CREATE POLICY statement (005_stability_patch.sql:148) but ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY was never run for that table in any migration.
conversations table has an anon UPDATE policy with USING (TRUE) - unscoped to any row.

5 identifiers used in live route code (active_users_view, invoices, lead_imports, payments, user_profiles) plus 1 column (leads.lead_stage) do not exist in any of the 9 migration files or the duplicate root 007_missing_tables.sql.
src/modules/automation/escalation-engine.ts, src/modules/followups/followup-engine.ts, and src/modules/followups/followup-rules.ts have zero importers anywhere in the codebase.
src/modules/leads/lead-stage-manager.ts is imported only by a dead, misnamed route file (src/app/api/leads/[id]/stage/lead-stage-route.ts), making it unreachable in production.
The entire src/lib/whatsapp/*.ts + src/services/whatsapp/process-inbound.ts subsystem (6 files, ~1020 LOC) has zero importers from any reachable code path.
src/app/api/proposals/email/route.ts does not send email server-side - it returns a mailto: URL with an explicit comment 'SMTP not configured'.
Two middleware.ts files exist (root and src/) with divergent, partially-commented-out logic.
Two tailwind config files exist (tailwind.config.js and tailwind.config.ts) with divergent font-family definitions.
src/app/auth/callback/route.ts redirects to /auth/auth-code-error on failure, but no such page exists anywhere in the project.
Migration 009_*.sql does not exist anywhere in the repository; numbering jumps from 008 to 010.
uninspected_items_across_all_parts: BOOKMYSPACES_BACKUP/bookmyspaces/ - acknowledged only, not inspected, per explicit instruction
src/app/actions/auth.ts, src/types/whatsapp.ts, src/constants/conversation-states.ts - existence verified, full line-by-line contents not read
Full function-body review of every src/lib file beyond exports/hardcoded-values/console-usage scan (targeted grep used instead of exhaustive line-by-line read for the largest files)
Whether any in-scope page contains hardcoded/mock data disguised as live data (only explicit placeholder-marker keyword scan performed)
Exact Tailwind config file precedence (.ts vs .js) when both exist - not resolvable from static file inspection alone
Vercel cron timezone behavior - relies on documented external platform behavior, not repo-internal evidence

Whether the 5 tables/1 column referenced in code but absent from migrations exist as undocumented schema drift in the live Supabase database - would require live DB access, out of scope for this read-only file-system audit
